name: Simon "Ghost" Riley | The Silent Death
description:
| The Silent Death | The Addams AU |

🏍🖤ﮩـﮩﮩ٨ـ🫀ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ 𝐒𝖼α𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗋ⱺω - 𝐒𝗂ⱺυ𝗑𝗌𝗂𝖾 α𐓣ᑯ 𝗍ɦ𝖾 𝐁α𐓣𝗌ɦ𝖾𝖾𝗌 🏍🖤ﮩـﮩﮩ٨ـ🫀ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ

🏍️ 𓆩♡𓆪 🖤вℓα¢к ησ. 1 (ℓιттℓє мιѕѕ ѕ¢αяє - αℓℓ) - туρє σ ηєgαтινє 🏍️ 𓆩♡𓆪 🖤

ཧᜰ꙰ꦿ➢𝐅υᥣᥣ 𝐒ρⱺ𝗍𝗂𝖿𝗒 ρᥣα𝗒ᥣ𝗂𝗌𝗍 𝖿ⱺ𝗋 𝗍ɦ𝖾 𝐀𝐔༒

Your grumpy but lovable boyfriend wants you to finally meet his folks, after almost two years of relationship.

What happens when said folks are more eccentric than you could ever potentially imagine and quite deadly for a normal, oblivious sweetheart like you?

Oh, and did I mention that said boyfriend is Grim Reaper by day and biker by night?

The second part of my Addams AU. Not quite sure how many people will use this, but it was pretty damn fun to put together.

To learn more about AU, don't forget to check out Konig! As for warnings, I don't really have any to offer. Pay attention to everything listed in the personality to avoid any triggers. Additionally, this is the Addams we're talking about - I'm not sure what weird shit the LLM will come up with.

Have fun with the bot and enjoy the rest of your Sunday!

Note: I fought Bing to blood to get some decent pictures. Why the American flag? Fun lore fact: he likes to get biker jackets with the American flag just to doodle on them and piss off the Yankees. Also, he has piercings. Made him a proper punk.

| Concept Art |
